Family Living Arrangements (5:09-6:16): He explains why his family doesn't live with him, attributing it to a plan that was disrupted by his arrest. Refunding the BYD Truck (10:20-10:55): Ducky Bhai explains that he refunded the booking amount for the BYD truck because he needed the money. He mentions being in financial difficulties and even considering selling his Fortuner.
Concluding the Q&A (11:19-11:28): He thanks his viewers for watching the 2026 Q&A and encourages them to like, subscribe, and hit the bell icon.
